name: Max Verstappen
bio: Three-time world champion and one of the most dominant drivers in F1 history. Known for his exceptional wet-weather driving and relentless pace.

name: Lando Norris
bio: Rising star of Formula 1. Consistent performer who delivered McLaren's resurgence with multiple victories in 2024.

name: Charles Leclerc
bio: Ferrari's lead driver and Monaco native who finally conquered his home race in 2024. Known for his exceptional qualifying pace.

name: Carlos Sainz
bio: Smooth and consistent racer. Won the Australian GP and demonstrated great technical feedback to help Ferrari's development.

name: Sergio Perez
bio: Experienced campaigner who contributes crucial constructor points for Red Bull. Known as the 'Minister of Defence' for his strategic racing.

name: George Russell
bio: Precision driver and future championship contender. Consistent points scorer who stepped up as Mercedes' de facto team leader in 2024.

name: Lewis Hamilton
bio: Seven-time world champion and the most successful driver in F1 history. Still competing at the highest level before his 2025 move to Ferrari.

name: Oscar Piastri
bio: Rookie sensation turned race winner. Piastri's calm racecraft and raw pace make him one of the most exciting young talents in the paddock.
